revision.comment: 新規
revision.text:
{{神社| 名称=大川神社| 所在地=京都府舞鶴市大川徹光山169-1| 位置={{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|26|52|N|135|15|29|E|}}| 祭神=保食神| 社格=式内社（名神大）・府社| 本殿=| 例祭=}} '''大川神社'''（おおかわじんじゃ）は、[[京都府]][[舞鶴市]]大川にある[[神社]]である。社格は[[式内社]]（[[名神大社|名神大]]）、[[府社]]。 ==祭神== *主神 [[保食神]] *相殿 句句廼馳神(木神)、軻遇突智神(火神)、埴山姫神(土神)、金山彦神(金神)、罔象水神(水神) ==歴史== 社伝によれば、「顕宗天皇乙丑年(485年)に宮柱を立て鎮祭、神位は貞観元年(859年)に従五位、同13年(861年)には正五位下に昇進した」とある。[[延喜式神名帳]]においては[[名神大社]]に列せられ、また[[六国史]]所載の神社である。近世に至り、[[丹後田辺藩|田辺藩主]]細川氏の保護を受けた。
明治5年に郷社、大正8年に府社に列せられた。
五穀豊穣、養蚕および病除、安産の守護神として近隣に知られ、北陸や関西地方からの参拝者も多い。 ==摂末社== * 竈神社（澳津彦神、澳津姫神） * 医祖神社（少彦名神） * 病除神社（健速須男命） * 興和神社 * 野々宮神社 ==文化財== '''市指定文化財''' * 本殿（1872年） * 拝殿（1820年） * 中門（1790年） {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:おおかわしんしや}} [[Category:京都府の神社]] [[Category:名神大社]] [[Category:府県社]] [[Category:舞鶴市]]

{{神社| 名称=大川神社| 所在地=京都府舞鶴市大川徹光山169-1| 位置={{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|26|52|N|135|15|29|E|}}| 祭神=保食神| 社格=式内社（名神大）・府社| 本殿=| 例祭=}} '''大川神社'''（おおかわじんじゃ）は、[[京都府]][[舞鶴市]]大川にある[[神社]]である。社格は[[式内社]]（[[名神大社|名神大]]）、[[府社]]。
== 祭神 == * 主神 [[保食神]] * 相殿 句句廼馳神（木神）、軻遇突智神（火神）、埴山姫神（土神）、金山彦神（金神）、罔象水神（水神）
== 歴史 == 社伝によれば、「顕宗天皇乙丑年（[[485年]]）に宮柱を立て鎮祭、神位は[[貞観]]元年（[[859年]]）に従五位、同13年（[[861年]]）には正五位下に昇進した。」とある。[[延喜式神名帳]]においては[[名神大社]]に列せられ、また[[六国史]]所載の神社である。近世に至り、[[丹後田辺藩|田辺藩主]]細川氏の保護を受けた。
[[1872年]]（[[明治]]5年）に郷社、[[1919年]]（[[大正]]8年）に府社に列せられた。
[[五穀豊穣]]、[[養蚕]]および病除、[[安産]]の[[守護神]]として近隣に知られ、[[北陸]]や関西地方からの参拝者も多い。
== 摂末社 == * 竈神社（澳津彦神、澳津姫神） * 医祖神社（少彦名神） * 病除神社（健速須男命） * 興和神社 * 野々宮神社
== 文化財 == '''市指定文化財''' * 本殿（[[1872年]]） * 拝殿（[[1820年]]） * 中門（[[1790年]]）
{{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:おおかわしんしや}} [[Category:京都府の神社]] [[Category:名神大社]] [[Category:府県社]] [[Category:舞鶴市]]

[[1872年]]（[[明治]]5年）に郷社、[[1919年]]（[[大正]]8年）に府社に列せられた。
[[五穀豊穣]]、[[養蚕]]および病除、[[安産]]の[[守護神]]として近隣に知られ、[[北陸]]や関西地方からの参拝者も多い。

== 文化財 == '''市指定文化財''' * 本殿（[[1872年]]） * 拝殿（[[1820年]]） * 中門（[[1790年]]）

{{神社| 名称=大川神社| |画像 = [[File:Okawajinzya shrine.jpg|240px]] 所在地=京都府舞鶴市大川徹光山169-1| 位置={{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|26|52|N|135|15|29|E|}}| 祭神=保食神| 社格=式内社（名神大）・府社| 本殿=| 例祭=}} '''大川神社'''（おおかわじんじゃ）は、[[京都府]][[舞鶴市]]大川にある[[神社]]である。社格は[[式内社]]（[[名神大社|名神大]]）、[[府社]]。

== 歴史 == 社伝によれば、「顕宗天皇乙丑年（[[485年]]）に宮柱を立て鎮祭、神位は[[貞観 (日本)|貞観]]元年（[[859年]]）に従五位、同13年（[[861年]]）には正五位下に昇進した」とある。[[延喜式神名帳]]においては[[名神大社]]に列せられ、また[[六国史]]所載の神社である。近世に至り、[[丹後田辺藩|田辺藩主]]細川氏の保護を受けた。
[[1872年]]（[[明治]]5年）に郷社、[[1919年]]（[[大正]]8年）に府社に列せられた。
[[五穀豊穣]]、[[養蚕]]および病除、[[安産]]の[[守護神]]として近隣に知られ、[[北陸]]や関西地方からの参拝者も多い。
== 摂末社 == * 竈神社（澳津彦神、澳津姫神） * 医祖神社（少彦名神） * 病除神社（健速須男命） * 興和神社 * 野々宮神社
== 文化財 == '''市指定文化財''' * 本殿（[[1872年]]） * 拝殿（[[1820年]]） * 中門（[[1790年]]）

{{nihongo|'''Ōkawa Shrine'''|大川神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Tango Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Ōkawa Shrine'''|大川神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Tango Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Ōkawa Shrine'''|大川神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Tango Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Ōkawa Shrine'''|大川神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Tango Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Ōkawa Shrine'''|大川神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Tango Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Ōkawa Shrine'''|大川神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Tango Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Ōkawa Shrine'''|大川神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Tango Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Ōkawa Shrine'''|大川神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Tango Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Ōkawa Shrine'''|大川神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Tango Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

{{nihongo|'''Ōkawa Shrine'''|大川神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Tango Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

revision.comment: 13 revisions imported
revision.text:
{{出典の明記|date=2020年7月}} {{神社 | 名称 = 大川神社 | 画像 = [[File:Okawajinzya shrine.jpg|250px]]
鳥居 | 所在地 = [[京都府]][[舞鶴市]]大川徹光山169-1 | 位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} | 祭神 = [[保食神]] | 社格 = [[式内社]]（名神大）・旧[[府社]] | 本殿 = | 例祭 = | 地図 = {{Location map|Japan Kyoto|label=大川神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=10|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''大川神社'''（おおかわじんじゃ）は、[[京都府]][[舞鶴市]]大川にある[[神社]]である。社格は[[式内社]]（[[名神大社|名神大]]）、[[府社]]。 == 祭神 == * 主神 [[保食神]] * 相殿 句句廼馳神（木神）、軻遇突智神（火神）、埴山姫神（土神）、金山彦神（金神）、罔象水神（水神） == 歴史 == 社伝によれば、「顕宗天皇乙丑年（[[485年]]）に宮柱を立て鎮祭、神位は[[貞観 (日本)|貞観]]元年（[[859年]]）に従五位、同13年（[[861年]]）には正五位下に昇進した」とある。[[延喜式神名帳]]においては[[名神大社]]に列せられ、また[[六国史]]所載の神社である。近世に至り、[[丹後田辺藩|田辺藩主]]細川氏の保護を受けた。 [[1872年]]（[[明治]]5年）に郷社、[[1919年]]（[[大正]]8年）に府社に列せられた。 [[五穀豊穣]]、[[養蚕]]および病除、[[安産]]の[[守護神]]として近隣に知られ、[[北陸]]や関西地方からの参拝者も多い。 == 摂末社 == * 竈神社（澳津彦神、澳津姫神） * 医祖神社（少彦名神） * 病除神社（健速須男命） * 興和神社 * 野々宮神社 == 文化財 == '''市指定文化財''' * 本殿（[[1872年]]） * 拝殿（[[1820年]]） * 中門（[[1790年]]） == 脚注 == {{Reflist}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:おおかわしんしや}} [[Category:京都府の神社]] [[Category:名神大社]] [[Category:丹後国の式内社|名おおかわしんしや]] [[Category:京都府の旧府社]] [[Category:舞鶴市の建築物]] [[Category:舞鶴市の歴史]]

[[Category:Shikinai Hiteisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Tango Province]] [[JA:大川神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11435192}} [[Category:Myōjin Taisha]] [[Category:Junior Fifth Rank]] [[Category:Senior Fifth Rank]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] {{translated page|ja|大川神社|version=107336830|comment=Imported full ja history}}[[Category:Automerged Japanese text]] == Japanese Wikipedia content == {{出典の明記|date=2020年7月}} {{神社 | 名称 = 大川神社 | 画像 = [[File:Okawajinzya shrine.jpg|250px]]
鳥居 | 所在地 = [[京都府]][[舞鶴市]]大川徹光山169-1 | 位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} | 祭神 = [[保食神]] | 社格 = [[式内社]]（名神大）・旧[[府社]] | 本殿 = | 例祭 = | 地図 = {{Location map|Japan Kyoto|label=大川神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=10|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''大川神社'''（おおかわじんじゃ）は、[[京都府]][[舞鶴市]]大川にある[[神社]]である。社格は[[式内社]]（[[名神大社|名神大]]）、[[府社]]。 == 祭神 == * 主神 [[保食神]] * 相殿 句句廼馳神（木神）、軻遇突智神（火神）、埴山姫神（土神）、金山彦神（金神）、罔象水神（水神） == 歴史 == 社伝によれば、「顕宗天皇乙丑年（[[485年]]）に宮柱を立て鎮祭、神位は[[貞観 (日本)|貞観]]元年（[[859年]]）に従五位、同13年（[[861年]]）には正五位下に昇進した」とある。[[延喜式神名帳]]においては[[名神大社]]に列せられ、また[[六国史]]所載の神社である。近世に至り、[[丹後田辺藩|田辺藩主]]細川氏の保護を受けた。 [[1872年]]（[[明治]]5年）に郷社、[[1919年]]（[[大正]]8年）に府社に列せられた。 [[五穀豊穣]]、[[養蚕]]および病除、[[安産]]の[[守護神]]として近隣に知られ、[[北陸]]や関西地方からの参拝者も多い。 == 摂末社 == * 竈神社（澳津彦神、澳津姫神） * 医祖神社（少彦名神） * 病除神社（健速須男命） * 興和神社 * 野々宮神社 == 文化財 == '''市指定文化財''' * 本殿（[[1872年]]） * 拝殿（[[1820年]]） * 中門（[[1790年]]） == 脚注 == {{Reflist}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:おおかわしんしや}} [[Category:京都府の神社]] [[Category:名神大社]] [[Category:丹後国の式内社|名おおかわしんしや]] [[Category:京都府の旧府社]] [[Category:舞鶴市の建築物]] [[Category:舞鶴市の歴史]] ==End Japanese==

[[Category:Shikinai Hiteisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Tango Province]] [[JA:大川神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11435192}} [[Category:Myōjin Taisha]] [[Category:Junior Fifth Rank]] [[Category:Senior Fifth Rank]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] {{translated page|ja|大川神社|version=107336830|comment=Imported full ja history}}[[Category:Automerged Japanese text]] == Japanese Wikipedia content == {{出典の明記|date=2020年7月}} {{神社 | 名称 = 大川神社 | 画像 = [[File:Okawajinzya shrine.jpg|250px]]
鳥居 | 所在地 = [[京都府]][[舞鶴市]]大川徹光山169-1 | 位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} | 祭神 = [[保食神]] | 社格 = [[式内社]]（名神大）・旧[[府社]] | 本殿 = | 例祭 = | 地図 = {{Location map|Japan Kyoto|label=大川神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=10|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''大川神社'''（おおかわじんじゃ）は、[[京都府]][[舞鶴市]]大川にある[[神社]]である。社格は[[式内社]]（[[名神大社|名神大]]）、[[府社]]。 == 祭神 == * 主神 [[保食神]] * 相殿 句句廼馳神（木神）、軻遇突智神（火神）、埴山姫神（土神）、金山彦神（金神）、罔象水神（水神） == 歴史 == 社伝によれば、「顕宗天皇乙丑年（[[485年]]）に宮柱を立て鎮祭、神位は[[貞観 (日本)|貞観]]元年（[[859年]]）に従五位、同13年（[[861年]]）には正五位下に昇進した」とある。[[延喜式神名帳]]においては[[名神大社]]に列せられ、また[[六国史]]所載の神社である。近世に至り、[[丹後田辺藩|田辺藩主]]細川氏の保護を受けた。 [[1872年]]（[[明治]]5年）に郷社、[[1919年]]（[[大正]]8年）に府社に列せられた。 [[五穀豊穣]]、[[養蚕]]および病除、[[安産]]の[[守護神]]として近隣に知られ、[[北陸]]や関西地方からの参拝者も多い。 == 摂末社 == * 竈神社（澳津彦神、澳津姫神） * 医祖神社（少彦名神） * 病除神社（健速須男命） * 興和神社 * 野々宮神社 == 文化財 == '''市指定文化財''' * 本殿（[[1872年]]） * 拝殿（[[1820年]]） * 中門（[[1790年]]） == 脚注 == {{Reflist}} {{Shinto-stub}} ==End Japanese== [[Category:京都府の神社]] [[Category:名神大社]] [[Category:丹後国の式内社|名おおかわしんしや]] [[Category:京都府の旧府社]] [[Category:舞鶴市の建築物]] [[Category:舞鶴市の歴史]]

[[Category:Shikinai Hiteisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Tango Province]] [[JA:大川神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11435192}} [[Category:Myōjin Taisha]] [[Category:Junior Fifth Rank]] [[Category:Senior Fifth Rank]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] {{translated page|ja|大川神社|version=107336830|comment=Imported full ja history}}[[Category:Automerged Japanese text]] == Japanese Wikipedia content == {{出典の明記|date=2020年7月}} {{神社 | 名称 = 大川神社 | 画像 = [[File:Okawajinzya shrine.jpg|250px]]
鳥居 | 所在地 = {{jalink|京都府|Q120730}}{{jalink|舞鶴市|Q750573}}大川徹光山169-1 | 位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} | 祭神 = {{jalink|保食神|Q2280323}} | 社格 = {{jalink|式内社}}（名神大）・旧{{jalink|府社}} | 本殿 = | 例祭 = | 地図 = {{Location map|Japan Kyoto|label=大川神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=10|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''大川神社'''（おおかわじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|京都府|Q120730}}{{jalink|舞鶴市|Q750573}}大川にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}である。社格は{{jalink|式内社}}（{{jalink|名神大社|Q9610964|名神大}}）、{{jalink|府社}}。 == 祭神 == * 主神 {{jalink|保食神|Q2280323}} * 相殿 句句廼馳神（木神）、軻遇突智神（火神）、埴山姫神（土神）、金山彦神（金神）、罔象水神（水神） == 歴史 == 社伝によれば、「顕宗天皇乙丑年（{{jalink|485年|Q31001}}）に宮柱を立て鎮祭、神位は{{jalink|貞観 (日本)|Q1075635|貞観}}元年（{{jalink|859年|Q23897}}）に従五位、同13年（{{jalink|861年|Q23913}}）には正五位下に昇進した」とある。{{jalink|延喜式神名帳|Q11064932}}においては{{jalink|名神大社|Q9610964}}に列せられ、また{{jalink|六国史|Q1151168}}所載の神社である。近世に至り、{{jalink|丹後田辺藩|Q10863423|田辺藩主}}細川氏の保護を受けた。 {{jalink|1872年|Q7753}}（{{jalink|明治|Q3125096}}5年）に郷社、{{jalink|1919年|Q2157}}（{{jalink|大正|Q329174}}8年）に府社に列せられた。 {{jalink|五穀豊穣}}、{{jalink|養蚕}}および病除、{{jalink|安産}}の{{jalink|守護神|Q131278957}}として近隣に知られ、{{jalink|北陸}}や関西地方からの参拝者も多い。 == 摂末社 == * 竈神社（澳津彦神、澳津姫神） * 医祖神社（少彦名神） * 病除神社（健速須男命） * 興和神社 * 野々宮神社 == 文化財 == '''市指定文化財''' * 本殿（{{jalink|1872年|Q7753}}） * 拝殿（{{jalink|1820年|Q6973}}） * 中門（{{jalink|1790年|Q7775}}） == 脚注 == {{Reflist}} {{Shinto-stub}} ==End Japanese== [[Category:京都府の神社]] [[Category:名神大社]] [[Category:丹後国の式内社|名おおかわしんしや]] [[Category:京都府の旧府社]] [[Category:舞鶴市の建築物]] [[Category:舞鶴市の歴史]]

'language': 'ja'} [[JA:大川神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11435192}} == Japanese content == {{出典の明記|date=2020年7月}} {{神社 | 名称 = 大川神社 | 画像 = [[File:Okawajinzya shrine.jpg|250px]]
鳥居 | 所在地 = {{jalink|京都府|Q120730}}{{jalink|舞鶴市|Q750573}}大川徹光山169-1 | 位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} | 祭神 = {{jalink|保食神|Q2280323}} | 社格 = {{jalink|式内社}}（名神大）・旧{{jalink|府社}} | 本殿 = | 例祭 = | 地図 = {{Location map|Japan Kyoto|label=大川神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=10|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''大川神社'''（おおかわじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|京都府|Q120730}}{{jalink|舞鶴市|Q750573}}大川にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}である。社格は{{jalink|式内社}}（{{jalink|名神大社|Q9610964|名神大}}）、{{jalink|府社}}。 === 祭神 === * 主神 {{jalink|保食神|Q2280323}} * 相殿 句句廼馳神（木神）、軻遇突智神（火神）、埴山姫神（土神）、金山彦神（金神）、罔象水神（水神） === 歴史 === 社伝によれば、「顕宗天皇乙丑年（{{jalink|485年|Q31001}}）に宮柱を立て鎮祭、神位は{{jalink|貞観 (日本)|Q1075635|貞観}}元年（{{jalink|859年|Q23897}}）に従五位、同13年（{{jalink|861年|Q23913}}）には正五位下に昇進した」とある。{{jalink|延喜式神名帳|Q11064932}}においては{{jalink|名神大社|Q9610964}}に列せられ、また{{jalink|六国史|Q1151168}}所載の神社である。近世に至り、{{jalink|丹後田辺藩|Q10863423|田辺藩主}}細川氏の保護を受けた。 {{jalink|1872年|Q7753}}（{{jalink|明治|Q3125096}}5年）に郷社、{{jalink|1919年|Q2157}}（{{jalink|大正|Q329174}}8年）に府社に列せられた。 {{jalink|五穀豊穣}}、{{jalink|養蚕}}および病除、{{jalink|安産}}の{{jalink|守護神|Q131278957}}として近隣に知られ、{{jalink|北陸}}や関西地方からの参拝者も多い。 === 摂末社 === * 竈神社（澳津彦神、澳津姫神） * 医祖神社（少彦名神） * 病除神社（健速須男命） * 興和神社 * 野々宮神社 === 文化財 === '''市指定文化財''' * 本殿（{{jalink|1872年|Q7753}}） * 拝殿（{{jalink|1820年|Q6973}}） * 中門（{{jalink|1790年|Q7775}}） === 脚注 === {{Reflist}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:おおかわしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]] [[Category:Autogenerated pages with jawiki interwikis, possibly accidentally overwritten]] [[Category:Myōjin Taisha]] [[Category:Shikinai Hiteisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Tango Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:京都府の神社]] [[Category:名神大社]] [[Category:丹後国の式内社|名おおかわしんしや]] [[Category:京都府の旧府社]] [[Category:舞鶴市の建築物]] [[Category:舞鶴市の歴史]]

'language': 'ja'} [[JA:大川神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11435192}} == Japanese content == {{出典の明記|date=2020年7月}} {{神社 | 名称 = 大川神社 | 画像 = [[File:Okawajinzya shrine.jpg|250px]]
鳥居 | 所在地 = {{jalink|京都府|Q120730}}{{jalink|舞鶴市|Q750573}}大川徹光山169-1 | 位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} | 祭神 = {{jalink|保食神|Q2280323}} | 社格 = {{jalink|式内社}}（名神大）・旧{{jalink|府社}} | 本殿 = | 例祭 = | 地図 = {{Location map|Japan Kyoto|label=大川神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=10|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''大川神社'''（おおかわじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|京都府|Q120730}}{{jalink|舞鶴市|Q750573}}大川にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}である。社格は{{jalink|式内社}}（{{jalink|名神大社|Q9610964|名神大}}）、{{jalink|府社}}。 === 祭神 === * 主神 {{jalink|保食神|Q2280323}} * 相殿 句句廼馳神（木神）、軻遇突智神（火神）、埴山姫神（土神）、金山彦神（金神）、罔象水神（水神） === 歴史 === 社伝によれば、「顕宗天皇乙丑年（{{jalink|485年|Q31001}}）に宮柱を立て鎮祭、神位は{{jalink|貞観 (日本)|Q1075635|貞観}}元年（{{jalink|859年|Q23897}}）に従五位、同13年（{{jalink|861年|Q23913}}）には正五位下に昇進した」とある。{{jalink|延喜式神名帳|Q11064932}}においては{{jalink|名神大社|Q9610964}}に列せられ、また{{jalink|六国史|Q1151168}}所載の神社である。近世に至り、{{jalink|丹後田辺藩|Q10863423|田辺藩主}}細川氏の保護を受けた。 {{jalink|1872年|Q7753}}（{{jalink|明治|Q3125096}}5年）に郷社、{{jalink|1919年|Q2157}}（{{jalink|大正|Q329174}}8年）に府社に列せられた。 {{jalink|五穀豊穣}}、{{jalink|養蚕}}および病除、{{jalink|安産}}の{{jalink|守護神|Q131278957}}として近隣に知られ、{{jalink|北陸}}や関西地方からの参拝者も多い。 === 摂末社 === * 竈神社（澳津彦神、澳津姫神） * 医祖神社（少彦名神） * 病除神社（健速須男命） * 興和神社 * 野々宮神社 === 文化財 === '''市指定文化財''' * 本殿（{{jalink|1872年|Q7753}}） * 拝殿（{{jalink|1820年|Q6973}}） * 中門（{{jalink|1790年|Q7775}}） === 脚注 === {{Reflist}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:おおかわしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]] [[Category:Myōjin Taisha]] [[Category:Shikinai Hiteisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Tango Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:京都府の神社]] [[Category:名神大社]] [[Category:丹後国の式内社|名おおかわしんしや]] [[Category:京都府の旧府社]] [[Category:舞鶴市の建築物]] [[Category:舞鶴市の歴史]] [[Category:need translation]]

鳥居 | 所在地 = {{jalink|京都府|Q120730}}{{jalink|舞鶴市|Q750573}}大川徹光山169-1 | 位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} | 祭神 = {{jalink|保食神|Q2280323}} | 社格 = {{jalink|式内社}}（名神大）・旧{{jalink|府社}} | 本殿 = | 例祭 = | 地図 = {{Location map|Japan Kyoto|label=大川神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=10|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''大川神社'''（おおかわじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|京都府|Q120730}}{{jalink|舞鶴市|Q750573}}大川にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}である。社格は{{jalink|式内社}}（{{jalink|名神大社|Q9610964|名神大}}）、{{jalink|府社}}。 === 祭神 === * 主神 {{jalink|保食神|Q2280323}} * 相殿 句句廼馳神（木神）、軻遇突智神（火神）、埴山姫神（土神）、金山彦神（金神）、罔象水神（水神） === 歴史 === 社伝によれば、「顕宗天皇乙丑年（{{jalink|485年|Q31001}}）に宮柱を立て鎮祭、神位は{{jalink|貞観 (日本)|Q1075635|貞観}}元年（{{jalink|859年|Q23897}}）に従五位、同13年（{{jalink|861年|Q23913}}）には正五位下に昇進した」とある。{{jalink|延喜式神名帳|Q11064932}}においては{{jalink|名神大社|Q9610964}}に列せられ、また{{jalink|六国史|Q1151168}}所載の神社である。近世に至り、{{jalink|丹後田辺藩|Q10863423|田辺藩主}}細川氏の保護を受けた。 {{jalink|1872年|Q7753}}（{{jalink|明治|Q3125096}}5年）に郷社、{{jalink|1919年|Q2157}}（{{jalink|大正|Q329174}}8年）に府社に列せられた。 {{jalink|五穀豊穣}}、{{jalink|養蚕}}および病除、{{jalink|安産}}の{{jalink|守護神|Q131278957}}として近隣に知られ、{{jalink|北陸}}や関西地方からの参拝者も多い。 === 摂末社 === * 竈神社（澳津彦神、澳津姫神） * 医祖神社（少彦名神） * 病除神社（健速須男命） * 興和神社 * 野々宮神社 === 文化財 === '''市指定文化財''' * 本殿（{{jalink|1872年|Q7753}}） * 拝殿（{{jalink|1820年|Q6973}}） * 中門（{{jalink|1790年|Q7775}}） === 脚注 === {{Reflist}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:おおかわしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Ōkawa Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Ōkawa Shrine]][[Category:Pages]] [[Category:Myōjin Taisha]] [[Category:Shikinai Hiteisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Tango Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:京都府の神社]] [[Category:名神大社]] [[Category:丹後国の式内社|名おおかわしんしや]] [[Category:京都府の旧府社]] [[Category:舞鶴市の建築物]] [[Category:舞鶴市の歴史]] [[Category:need translation]]

'language': 'ja'} [[JA:大川神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11435192}} == Japanese content == {{出典の明記|date=July 2020}} {{神社 | 名称 = Ōkawa Shrine | 画像 = [[File:Okawajinzya shrine.jpg|250px]]
Torii | 所在地 = {{jalink|Kyoto Prefecture|Q120730}}{{jalink|Maizuru|Q750573}} Ōkawa Tekkōzan 169-1 | 位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} | 祭神 = {{jalink|Ukemochi|Q2280323}} | 社格 = {{jalink|Shikinaisha}} (Myōjin Taisha) / former {{jalink|Fusha}} | 本殿 = | 例祭 = | 地図 = {{Location map|Japan Kyoto|label=Ōkawa Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=10|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Ōkawa Shrine''' (おおかわじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|Shinto shrine|Q845945}} in Ōkawa, {{jalink|Maizuru|Q750573}}, {{jalink|Kyoto Prefecture|Q120730}}. Its rank is {{jalink|Shikinaisha}} ({{jalink|Myōjin Taisha|Q9610964|Myōjin-tai}}), and former {{jalink|Fusha}}. === Enshrined deities === * Main deity: {{jalink|Ukemochi|Q2280323}} * Associated deities in the same hall: Kukunochi-no-Kami (wood deity), Kagutsuchi-no-Kami (fire deity), Haniyamahime-no-Kami (earth deity), Kanayamahiko-no-Kami (metal deity), Mizuha-no-Kami (water deity) === History === According to shrine tradition: "In the Year of the Ox of Emperor Kensō ({{jalink|485|Q31001}}), the sacred pillars were raised and the shrine was consecrated. In the first year of {{jalink|Jōgan (Japan)|Q1075635|Jōgan}} ({{jalink|859|Q23897}}), divine rank was Junior Fifth Rank; in year 13 ({{jalink|861|Q23913}}), it rose to Senior Fifth Rank Lower." In the {{jalink|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932}} it was listed as a {{jalink|Myōjin Taisha|Q9610964}}, and it is also a shrine recorded in the {{jalink|Rikkokushi|Q1151168}}. In early modern times, it received protection from the Hosokawa lords of the {{jalink|Tanabe Domain (Tango)|Q10863423|Tanabe Domain}}. In {{jalink|1872|Q7753}} (Meiji 5), it became a gōsha, and in {{jalink|1919|Q2157}} (Taishō 8), it was ranked as a fusha. It is known locally as a {{jalink|guardian deity|Q131278957}} for {{jalink|bountiful harvests}}, sericulture, disease prevention, and safe childbirth, and has many worshippers from {{jalink|Hokuriku}} and the Kansai region. === Sessha and Massha === * Kamado Shrine (Okitsuhiko-no-Kami, Okitsuhime-no-Kami) * Iso Shrine (Sukunahikona-no-Kami) * Yakuyoke Shrine (Takehayasusano-no-Mikoto) * Kōwa Shrine * Nonomiya Shrine === Cultural properties === '''City-designated cultural properties''' * Main sanctuary ({{jalink|1872|Q7753}}) * Worship hall ({{jalink|1820|Q6973}}) * Middle gate ({{jalink|1790|Q7775}}) === Notes === {{Reflist}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:おおかわしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Ōkawa Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Ōkawa Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Myōjin Taisha]] [[Category:Shikinai Hiteisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Tango Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:京都府の神社]] [[Category:名神大社]] [[Category:丹後国の式内社|名おおかわしんしや]] [[Category:京都府の旧府社]] [[Category:舞鶴市の建築物]] [[Category:舞鶴市の歴史]] [[Category:need translation]]

Torii | 所在地 = {{jalink|Kyoto Prefecture|Q120730}}{{jalink|Maizuru|Q750573}} Ōkawa Tekkōzan 169-1 | 位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} | 祭神 = {{jalink|Ukemochi|Q2280323}} | 社格 = {{jalink|Shikinaisha}} (Myōjin Taisha) / former {{jalink|Fusha}} | 本殿 = | 例祭 = | 地図 = {{Location map|Japan Kyoto|label=Ōkawa Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=10|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Ōkawa Shrine''' (おおかわじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|Shinto shrine|Q845945}} in Ōkawa, {{jalink|Maizuru|Q750573}}, {{jalink|Kyoto Prefecture|Q120730}}. Its rank is {{jalink|Shikinaisha}} ({{jalink|Myōjin Taisha|Q9610964|Myōjin-tai}}), and former {{jalink|Fusha}}. === Enshrined deities === * Main deity: {{jalink|Ukemochi|Q2280323}} * Associated deities in the same hall: Kukunochi-no-Kami (wood deity), Kagutsuchi-no-Kami (fire deity), Haniyamahime-no-Kami (earth deity), Kanayamahiko-no-Kami (metal deity), Mizuha-no-Kami (water deity) === History === According to shrine tradition: "In the Year of the Ox of Emperor Kensō ({{jalink|485|Q31001}}), the sacred pillars were raised and the shrine was consecrated. In the first year of {{jalink|Jōgan (Japan)|Q1075635|Jōgan}} ({{jalink|859|Q23897}}), divine rank was Junior Fifth Rank; in year 13 ({{jalink|861|Q23913}}), it rose to Senior Fifth Rank Lower." In the {{jalink|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932}} it was listed as a {{jalink|Myōjin Taisha|Q9610964}}, and it is also a shrine recorded in the {{jalink|Rikkokushi|Q1151168}}. In early modern times, it received protection from the Hosokawa lords of the {{jalink|Tanabe Domain (Tango)|Q10863423|Tanabe Domain}}. In {{jalink|1872|Q7753}} (Meiji 5), it became a gōsha, and in {{jalink|1919|Q2157}} (Taishō 8), it was ranked as a fusha. It is known locally as a {{jalink|guardian deity|Q131278957}} for {{jalink|bountiful harvests}}, sericulture, disease prevention, and safe childbirth, and has many worshippers from {{jalink|Hokuriku}} and the Kansai region. === Sessha and Massha === * Kamado Shrine (Okitsuhiko-no-Kami, Okitsuhime-no-Kami) * Iso Shrine (Sukunahikona-no-Kami) * Yakuyoke Shrine (Takehayasusano-no-Mikoto) * Kōwa Shrine * Nonomiya Shrine === Cultural properties === '''City-designated cultural properties''' * Main sanctuary ({{jalink|1872|Q7753}}) * Worship hall ({{jalink|1820|Q6973}}) * Middle gate ({{jalink|1790|Q7775}}) === Notes === {{Reflist}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:おおかわしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Ōkawa Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Ōkawa Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Myōjin Taisha]] [[Category:Shikinai Hiteisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Tango Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:京都府の神社]] [[Category:名神大社]] [[Category:丹後国の式内社|名おおかわしんしや]] [[Category:京都府の旧府社]] [[Category:舞鶴市の建築物]] [[Category:舞鶴市の歴史]] [[Category:need translation]]

'language': 'ja'} [[JA:大川神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11435192}} == Japanese content == {{出典の明記|date=July 2020}} {{神社 | 名称 = Ōkawa Shrine | 画像 = [[File:Okawajinzya shrine.jpg|250px]]
Torii | 所在地 = {{jalink|Kyoto Prefecture|Q120730}}{{jalink|Maizuru|Q750573}} Ōkawa Tekkōzan 169-1 | 位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} | 祭神 = {{jalink|Ukemochi|Q2280323}} | 社格 = {{jalink|Shikinaisha}} (Myōjin Taisha) / former {{jalink|Fusha}} | 本殿 = | 例祭 = | 地図 = {{Location map|Japan Kyoto|label=Ōkawa Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=10|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Ōkawa Shrine''' (おおかわじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|Shinto shrine|Q845945}} in Ōkawa, {{jalink|Maizuru|Q750573}}, {{jalink|Kyoto Prefecture|Q120730}}. Its rank is {{jalink|Shikinaisha}} ({{jalink|Myōjin Taisha|Q9610964|Myōjin-tai}}), and former {{jalink|Fusha}}. === Enshrined deities === * Main deity: {{jalink|Ukemochi|Q2280323}} * Associated deities in the same hall: Kukunochi-no-Kami (wood deity), Kagutsuchi-no-Kami (fire deity), Haniyamahime-no-Kami (earth deity), Kanayamahiko-no-Kami (metal deity), Mizuha-no-Kami (water deity) === History === According to shrine tradition: "In the Year of the Ox of Emperor Kensō ({{jalink|485|Q31001}}), the sacred pillars were raised and the shrine was consecrated. In the first year of {{jalink|Jōgan (Japan)|Q1075635|Jōgan}} ({{jalink|859|Q23897}}), divine rank was Junior Fifth Rank; in year 13 ({{jalink|861|Q23913}}), it rose to Senior Fifth Rank Lower." In the {{jalink|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932}} it was listed as a {{jalink|Myōjin Taisha|Q9610964}}, and it is also a shrine recorded in the {{jalink|Rikkokushi|Q1151168}}. In early modern times, it received protection from the Hosokawa lords of the {{jalink|Tanabe Domain (Tango)|Q10863423|Tanabe Domain}}. In {{jalink|1872|Q7753}} (Meiji 5), it became a gōsha, and in {{jalink|1919|Q2157}} (Taishō 8), it was ranked as a fusha. It is known locally as a {{jalink|guardian deity|Q131278957}} for {{jalink|bountiful harvests}}, sericulture, disease prevention, and safe childbirth, and has many worshippers from {{jalink|Hokuriku}} and the Kansai region. === Sessha and Massha === * Kamado Shrine (Okitsuhiko-no-Kami, Okitsuhime-no-Kami) * Iso Shrine (Sukunahikona-no-Kami) * Yakuyoke Shrine (Takehayasusano-no-Mikoto) * Kōwa Shrine * Nonomiya Shrine === Cultural properties === '''City-designated cultural properties''' * Main sanctuary ({{jalink|1872|Q7753}}) * Worship hall ({{jalink|1820|Q6973}}) * Middle gate ({{jalink|1790|Q7775}}) === Notes === {{Reflist}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:おおかわしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Ōkawa Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Ōkawa Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Myōjin Taisha]] [[Category:Shikinai Hiteisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Tango Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:京都府の神社]] [[Category:名神大社]] [[Category:丹後国の式内社|名おおかわしんしや]] [[Category:京都府の旧府社]] [[Category:舞鶴市の建築物]] [[Category:舞鶴市の歴史]] [[Category:need translation]]

'language': 'ja'} [[JA:大川神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11435192}} == Japanese content == {{出典の明記|date=July 2020}} {{神社 | 名称 = Ōkawa Shrine | 画像 = [[File:Okawajinzya shrine.jpg|250px]]
Torii | 所在地 = {{jalink|Kyoto Prefecture|Q120730}}{{jalink|Maizuru|Q750573}} Ōkawa Tekkōzan 169-1 | 位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} | 祭神 = {{jalink|Ukemochi|Q2280323}} | 社格 = {{jalink|Shikinaisha}} (Myōjin Taisha) / former {{jalink|Fusha}} | 本殿 = | 例祭 = | 地図 = {{Location map|Japan Kyoto|label=Ōkawa Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=10|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Ōkawa Shrine''' (おおかわじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|Shinto shrine|Q845945}} in Ōkawa, {{jalink|Maizuru|Q750573}}, {{jalink|Kyoto Prefecture|Q120730}}. Its rank is {{jalink|Shikinaisha}} ({{jalink|Myōjin Taisha|Q9610964|Myōjin-tai}}), and former {{jalink|Fusha}}. === Enshrined deities === * Main deity: {{jalink|Ukemochi|Q2280323}} * Associated deities in the same hall: Kukunochi-no-Kami (wood deity), Kagutsuchi-no-Kami (fire deity), Haniyamahime-no-Kami (earth deity), Kanayamahiko-no-Kami (metal deity), Mizuha-no-Kami (water deity) === History === According to shrine tradition: "In the Year of the Ox of Emperor Kensō ({{jalink|485|Q31001}}), the sacred pillars were raised and the shrine was consecrated. In the first year of {{jalink|Jōgan (Japan)|Q1075635|Jōgan}} ({{jalink|859|Q23897}}), divine rank was Junior Fifth Rank; in year 13 ({{jalink|861|Q23913}}), it rose to Senior Fifth Rank Lower." In the {{jalink|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932}} it was listed as a {{jalink|Myōjin Taisha|Q9610964}}, and it is also a shrine recorded in the {{jalink|Rikkokushi|Q1151168}}. In early modern times, it received protection from the Hosokawa lords of the {{jalink|Tanabe Domain (Tango)|Q10863423|Tanabe Domain}}. In {{jalink|1872|Q7753}} (Meiji 5), it became a gōsha, and in {{jalink|1919|Q2157}} (Taishō 8), it was ranked as a fusha. It is known locally as a {{jalink|guardian deity|Q131278957}} for {{jalink|bountiful harvests}}, sericulture, disease prevention, and safe childbirth, and has many worshippers from {{jalink|Hokuriku}} and the Kansai region. === Sessha and Massha === * Kamado Shrine (Okitsuhiko-no-Kami, Okitsuhime-no-Kami) * Iso Shrine (Sukunahikona-no-Kami) * Yakuyoke Shrine (Takehayasusano-no-Mikoto) * Kōwa Shrine * Nonomiya Shrine === Cultural properties === '''City-designated cultural properties''' * Main sanctuary ({{jalink|1872|Q7753}}) * Worship hall ({{jalink|1820|Q6973}}) * Middle gate ({{jalink|1790|Q7775}}) === Notes === {{Reflist}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:おおかわしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Ōkawa Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Ōkawa Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Myōjin Taisha]] [[Category:Shikinai Hiteisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Tango Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:京都府の神社]] [[Category:名神大社]] [[Category:丹後国の式内社|名おおかわしんしや]] [[Category:京都府の旧府社]] [[Category:舞鶴市の建築物]] [[Category:舞鶴市の歴史]][[Category:qq]]

Its rank is {{jalink|Shikinaisha}} ({{jalink|Myōjin Taisha|Q9610964|Myōjin-tai}}), and former {{jalink|Fusha}}. === Enshrined deities === * Main deity: {{jalink|Ukemochi|Q2280323}} * Associated deities in the same hall: Kukunochi-no-Kami (wood deity), Kagutsuchi-no-Kami (fire deity), Haniyamahime-no-Kami (earth deity), Kanayamahiko-no-Kami (metal deity), Mizuha-no-Kami (water deity) === History === According to shrine tradition: "In the Year of the Ox of Emperor Kensō ({{jalink|485|Q31001}}), the sacred pillars were raised and the shrine was consecrated. In the first year of {{jalink|Jōgan (Japan)|Q1075635|Jōgan}} ({{jalink|859|Q23897}}), divine rank was Junior Fifth Rank; in year 13 ({{jalink|861|Q23913}}), it rose to Senior Fifth Rank Lower." In the {{jalink|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932}} it was listed as a {{jalink|Myōjin Taisha|Q9610964}}, and it is also a shrine recorded in the {{jalink|Rikkokushi|Q1151168}}. In early modern times, it received protection from the Hosokawa lords of the {{jalink|Tanabe Domain (Tango)|Q10863423|Tanabe Domain}}. In {{jalink|1872|Q7753}} (Meiji 5), it became a gōsha, and in {{jalink|1919|Q2157}} (Taishō 8), it was ranked as a fusha. It is known locally as a {{jalink|guardian deity|Q131278957}} for {{jalink|bountiful harvests}}, sericulture, disease prevention, and safe childbirth, and has many worshippers from {{jalink|Hokuriku}} and the Kansai region. === Sessha and Massha === * Kamado Shrine (Okitsuhiko-no-Kami, Okitsuhime-no-Kami) * Iso Shrine (Sukunahikona-no-Kami) * Yakuyoke Shrine (Takehayasusano-no-Mikoto) * Kōwa Shrine * Nonomiya Shrine === Cultural properties === '''City-designated cultural properties''' * Main sanctuary ({{jalink|1872|Q7753}}) * Worship hall ({{jalink|1820|Q6973}}) * Middle gate ({{jalink|1790|Q7775}}) === Notes === {{Reflist}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:おおかわしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Ōkawa Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Ōkawa Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Myōjin Taisha]] [[Category:Shikinai Hiteisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Tango Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:京都府の神社]] [[Category:名神大社]] [[Category:丹後国の式内社|名おおかわしんしや]] [[Category:京都府の旧府社]] [[Category:舞鶴市の建築物]] [[Category:舞鶴市の歴史]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]] [[Category:qqqqqqq]]

It is known locally as a {{ill|lt=guardian deity|Q131278957|WD=Q131278957}} for {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=bountiful harvests|UNKNOWN}}, sericulture, disease prevention, and safe childbirth, and has many worshippers from {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Hokuriku|UNKNOWN}} and the Kansai region. === Sessha and Massha === * Kamado Shrine (Okitsuhiko-no-Kami, Okitsuhime-no-Kami) * Iso Shrine (Sukunahikona-no-Kami) * Yakuyoke Shrine (Takehayasusano-no-Mikoto) * Kōwa Shrine * Nonomiya Shrine === Cultural properties === '''City-designated cultural properties''' * Main sanctuary ({{ill|lt=1872|Q7753|WD=Q7753}}) * Worship hall ({{ill|lt=1820|Q6973|WD=Q6973}}) * Middle gate ({{ill|lt=1790|Q7775|WD=Q7775}}) === Notes === {{Reflist}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:おおかわしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Ōkawa Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Ōkawa Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Myōjin Taisha]] [[Category:Shikinai Hiteisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Tango Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:京都府の神社]] [[Category:名神大社]] [[Category:丹後国の式内社|名おおかわしんしや]] [[Category:京都府の旧府社]] [[Category:舞鶴市の建築物]] [[Category:舞鶴市の歴史]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]] [[Category:qqqqqqq]]

Torii | 所在地 = {{ill|lt=Kyoto Prefecture|Q120730|WD=Q120730}}{{ill|lt=Maizuru|Q750573|WD=Q750573}} Ōkawa Tekkōzan 169-1 | 位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} | 祭神 = {{ill|lt=Ukemochi|Q2280323|WD=Q2280323}} | 社格 = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=UNKNOWN}} (Myōjin Taisha) / former {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Fusha|1=UNKNOWN}} | 本殿 = | 例祭 = | 地図 = {{Location map|Japan Kyoto|label=Ōkawa Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=10|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Ōkawa Shrine''' (おおかわじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945}} in Ōkawa, {{ill|lt=Maizuru|Q750573|WD=Q750573}}, {{ill|lt=Kyoto Prefecture|Q120730|WD=Q120730}}. Its rank is {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=UNKNOWN}} ({{ill|lt=Myōjin Taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964|lt=Myōjin-tai}}), and former {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Fusha|1=UNKNOWN}}. === Enshrined deities === * Main deity: {{ill|lt=Ukemochi|Q2280323|WD=Q2280323}} * Associated deities in the same hall: Kukunochi-no-Kami (wood deity), Kagutsuchi-no-Kami (fire deity), Haniyamahime-no-Kami (earth deity), Kanayamahiko-no-Kami (metal deity), Mizuha-no-Kami (water deity) === History === According to shrine tradition: "In the Year of the Ox of Emperor Kensō ({{ill|lt=485|Q31001|WD=Q31001}}), the sacred pillars were raised and the shrine was consecrated. In the first year of {{ill|lt=Jōgan (Japan)|Q1075635|WD=Q1075635|lt=Jōgan}} ({{ill|lt=859|Q23897|WD=Q23897}}), divine rank was Junior Fifth Rank; in year 13 ({{ill|lt=861|Q23913|WD=Q23913}}), it rose to Senior Fifth Rank Lower." In the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932}} it was listed as a {{ill|lt=Myōjin Taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964}}, and it is also a shrine recorded in the {{ill|lt=Rikkokushi|Q1151168|WD=Q1151168}}. In early modern times, it received protection from the Hosokawa lords of the {{ill|lt=Tanabe Domain (Tango)|Q10863423|WD=Q10863423|lt=Tanabe Domain}}. In {{ill|lt=1872|Q7753|WD=Q7753}} (Meiji 5), it became a gōsha, and in {{ill|lt=1919|Q2157|WD=Q2157}} (Taishō 8), it was ranked as a fusha. It is known locally as a {{ill|lt=guardian deity|Q131278957|WD=Q131278957}} for {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=bountiful harvests|1=UNKNOWN}}, sericulture, disease prevention, and safe childbirth, and has many worshippers from {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Hokuriku|1=UNKNOWN}} and the Kansai region. === Sessha and Massha === * Kamado Shrine (Okitsuhiko-no-Kami, Okitsuhime-no-Kami) * Iso Shrine (Sukunahikona-no-Kami) * Yakuyoke Shrine (Takehayasusano-no-Mikoto) * Kōwa Shrine * Nonomiya Shrine === Cultural properties === '''City-designated cultural properties''' * Main sanctuary ({{ill|lt=1872|Q7753|WD=Q7753}}) * Worship hall ({{ill|lt=1820|Q6973|WD=Q6973}}) * Middle gate ({{ill|lt=1790|Q7775|WD=Q7775}}) === Notes === {{Reflist}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:おおかわしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Ōkawa Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Ōkawa Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Myōjin Taisha]] [[Category:Shikinai Hiteisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Tango Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:京都府の神社]] [[Category:名神大社]] [[Category:丹後国の式内社|名おおかわしんしや]] [[Category:京都府の旧府社]] [[Category:舞鶴市の建築物]] [[Category:舞鶴市の歴史]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]] [[Category:qqqqqqq]]

'language': 'ja'} [[JA:大川神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11435192}} == Japanese content == {{出典の明記|date=July 2020}} {{神社 | 名称 = Ōkawa Shrine | 画像 = [[File:Okawajinzya shrine.jpg|250px]]
Torii | 所在地 = {{ill|lt=Kyoto Prefecture|Q120730|WD=Q120730}}{{ill|lt=Maizuru|Q750573|WD=Q750573}} Ōkawa Tekkōzan 169-1 | 位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} | 祭神 = {{ill|lt=Ukemochi|Q2280323|WD=Q2280323}} | 社格 = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=UNKNOWN|WD=Q134917286}} (Myōjin Taisha) / former {{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q134917326|lt=Fusha|1=UNKNOWN}} | 本殿 = | 例祭 = | 地図 = {{Location map|Japan Kyoto|label=Ōkawa Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=10|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Ōkawa Shrine''' (おおかわじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945}} in Ōkawa, {{ill|lt=Maizuru|Q750573|WD=Q750573}}, {{ill|lt=Kyoto Prefecture|Q120730|WD=Q120730}}. Its rank is {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=UNKNOWN|WD=Q134917286}} ({{ill|lt=Myōjin Taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964|lt=Myōjin-tai}}), and former {{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q134917326|lt=Fusha|1=UNKNOWN}}. === Enshrined deities === * Main deity: {{ill|lt=Ukemochi|Q2280323|WD=Q2280323}} * Associated deities in the same hall: Kukunochi-no-Kami (wood deity), Kagutsuchi-no-Kami (fire deity), Haniyamahime-no-Kami (earth deity), Kanayamahiko-no-Kami (metal deity), Mizuha-no-Kami (water deity) === History === According to shrine tradition: "In the Year of the Ox of Emperor Kensō ({{ill|lt=485|Q31001|WD=Q31001}}), the sacred pillars were raised and the shrine was consecrated. In the first year of {{ill|lt=Jōgan (Japan)|Q1075635|WD=Q1075635|lt=Jōgan}} ({{ill|lt=859|Q23897|WD=Q23897}}), divine rank was Junior Fifth Rank; in year 13 ({{ill|lt=861|Q23913|WD=Q23913}}), it rose to Senior Fifth Rank Lower." In the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932}} it was listed as a {{ill|lt=Myōjin Taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964}}, and it is also a shrine recorded in the {{ill|lt=Rikkokushi|Q1151168|WD=Q1151168}}. In early modern times, it received protection from the Hosokawa lords of the {{ill|lt=Tanabe Domain (Tango)|Q10863423|WD=Q10863423|lt=Tanabe Domain}}. In {{ill|lt=1872|Q7753|WD=Q7753}} (Meiji 5), it became a gōsha, and in {{ill|lt=1919|Q2157|WD=Q2157}} (Taishō 8), it was ranked as a fusha. It is known locally as a {{ill|lt=guardian deity|Q131278957|WD=Q131278957}} for {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=bountiful harvests|1=UNKNOWN}}, sericulture, disease prevention, and safe childbirth, and has many worshippers from {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Hokuriku|1=UNKNOWN}} and the Kansai region. === Sessha and Massha === * Kamado Shrine (Okitsuhiko-no-Kami, Okitsuhime-no-Kami) * Iso Shrine (Sukunahikona-no-Kami) * Yakuyoke Shrine (Takehayasusano-no-Mikoto) * Kōwa Shrine * Nonomiya Shrine === Cultural properties === '''City-designated cultural properties''' * Main sanctuary ({{ill|lt=1872|Q7753|WD=Q7753}}) * Worship hall ({{ill|lt=1820|Q6973|WD=Q6973}}) * Middle gate ({{ill|lt=1790|Q7775|WD=Q7775}}) === Notes === {{Reflist}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:おおかわしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Ōkawa Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Ōkawa Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Myōjin Taisha]] [[Category:Shikinai Hiteisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Tango Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:京都府の神社]] [[Category:名神大社]] [[Category:丹後国の式内社|名おおかわしんしや]] [[Category:京都府の旧府社]] [[Category:舞鶴市の建築物]] [[Category:舞鶴市の歴史]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]] [[Category:qqqqqqq]]

shrine.jpg|250px]]
Torii | 所在地 = {{ill|lt=Kyoto Prefecture|Q120730|WD=Q120730|1=Kyoto Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Maizuru|Q750573|WD=Q750573|1=Maizuru}} Ōkawa Tekkōzan 169-1 | 位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} | 祭神 = {{ill|lt=Ukemochi|Q2280323|WD=Q2280323|1=Ukemochi}} | 社格 = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} (Myōjin Taisha) / former {{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q134917326|lt=Fusha|1=Fu-sha}} | 本殿 = | 例祭 = | 地図 = {{Location map|Japan Kyoto|label=Ōkawa Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=10|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Ōkawa Shrine''' (おおかわじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in Ōkawa, {{ill|lt=Maizuru|Q750573|WD=Q750573|1=Maizuru}}, {{ill|lt=Kyoto Prefecture|Q120730|WD=Q120730|1=Kyoto Prefecture}}. Its rank is {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} ({{ill|lt=Myōjin Taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964|lt=Myōjin-tai|1=Myōjin Taisha}}), and former {{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q134917326|lt=Fusha|1=Fu-sha}}. === Enshrined deities === * Main deity: {{ill|lt=Ukemochi|Q2280323|WD=Q2280323|1=Ukemochi}} * Associated deities in the same hall: Kukunochi-no-Kami (wood deity), Kagutsuchi-no-Kami (fire deity), Haniyamahime-no-Kami (earth deity), Kanayamahiko-no-Kami (metal deity), Mizuha-no-Kami (water deity) === History === According to shrine tradition: "In the Year of the Ox of Emperor Kensō ({{ill|lt=485|Q31001|WD=Q31001|1=485}}), the sacred pillars were raised and the shrine was consecrated. In the first year of {{ill|lt=Jōgan (Japan)|Q1075635|WD=Q1075635|lt=Jōgan|1=Jōgan}} ({{ill|lt=859|Q23897|WD=Q23897|1=859}}), divine rank was Junior Fifth Rank; in year 13 ({{ill|lt=861|Q23913|WD=Q23913|1=861}}), it rose to Senior Fifth Rank Lower." In the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}} it was listed as a {{ill|lt=Myōjin Taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964|1=Myōjin Taisha}}, and it is also a shrine recorded in the {{ill|lt=Rikkokushi|Q1151168|WD=Q1151168|1=Rikkokushi}}. In early modern times, it received protection from the Hosokawa lords of the {{ill|lt=Tanabe Domain (Tango)|Q10863423|WD=Q10863423|lt=Tanabe Domain|1=Tango-Tanabe Domain}}. In {{ill|lt=1872|Q7753|WD=Q7753|1=1872}} (Meiji 5), it became a gōsha, and in {{ill|lt=1919|Q2157|WD=Q2157|1=1919}} (Taishō 8), it was ranked as a fusha. It is known locally as a {{ill|lt=guardian deity|Q131278957|WD=Q131278957|1=Guardian deities}} for {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=bountiful harvests|1=UNKNOWN}}, sericulture, disease prevention, and safe childbirth, and has many worshippers from {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Hokuriku|1=UNKNOWN}} and the Kansai region. === Sessha and Massha === * Kamado Shrine (Okitsuhiko-no-Kami, Okitsuhime-no-Kami) * Iso Shrine (Sukunahikona-no-Kami) * Yakuyoke Shrine (Takehayasusano-no-Mikoto) * Kōwa Shrine * Nonomiya Shrine === Cultural properties === '''City-designated cultural properties''' * Main sanctuary ({{ill|lt=1872|Q7753|WD=Q7753|1=1872}}) * Worship hall ({{ill|lt=1820|Q6973|WD=Q6973|1=1820}}) * Middle gate ({{ill|lt=1790|Q7775|WD=Q7775|1=1790}}) === Notes === {{Reflist}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:おおかわしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Ōkawa Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Ōkawa Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Myōjin Taisha]] [[Category:Shikinai Hiteisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Tango Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:京都府の神社]] [[Category:名神大社]] [[Category:丹後国の式内社|名おおかわしんしや]] [[Category:京都府の旧府社]] [[Category:舞鶴市の建築物]] [[Category:舞鶴市の歴史]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]] [[Category:qqqqqqq]]

{'text': '京都府舞鶴市大川徹光山169-1', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:大川神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11435192}} == Japanese content == {{出典の明記|date=July 2020}} {{神社 | 名称 = Ōkawa Shrine | 画像 = [[File:Okawajinzya shrine.jpg|250px]]
Torii | 所在地 = {{ill|lt=Kyoto Prefecture|Q120730|WD=Q120730|1=Kyoto Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Maizuru|Q750573|WD=Q750573|1=Maizuru}} Ōkawa Tekkōzan 169-1 | 位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} | 祭神 = {{ill|lt=Ukemochi|Q2280323|WD=Q2280323|1=Ukemochi}} | 社格 = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} (Myōjin Taisha) / former {{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q134917326|lt=Fusha|1=Fu-sha}} | 本殿 = | 例祭 = | 地図 = {{Location map|Japan Kyoto|label=Ōkawa Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=10|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Ōkawa Shrine''' (おおかわじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in Ōkawa, {{ill|lt=Maizuru|Q750573|WD=Q750573|1=Maizuru}}, {{ill|lt=Kyoto Prefecture|Q120730|WD=Q120730|1=Kyoto Prefecture}}. Its rank is {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} ({{ill|lt=Myōjin Taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964|lt=Myōjin-tai|1=Myōjin Taisha}}), and former {{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q134917326|lt=Fusha|1=Fu-sha}}. === Enshrined deities === * Main deity: {{ill|lt=Ukemochi|Q2280323|WD=Q2280323|1=Ukemochi}} * Associated deities in the same hall: Kukunochi-no-Kami (wood deity), Kagutsuchi-no-Kami (fire deity), Haniyamahime-no-Kami (earth deity), Kanayamahiko-no-Kami (metal deity), Mizuha-no-Kami (water deity) === History === According to shrine tradition: "In the Year of the Ox of Emperor Kensō ({{ill|lt=485|Q31001|WD=Q31001|1=485}}), the sacred pillars were raised and the shrine was consecrated. In the first year of {{ill|lt=Jōgan (Japan)|Q1075635|WD=Q1075635|lt=Jōgan|1=Jōgan}} ({{ill|lt=859|Q23897|WD=Q23897|1=859}}), divine rank was Junior Fifth Rank; in year 13 ({{ill|lt=861|Q23913|WD=Q23913|1=861}}), it rose to Senior Fifth Rank Lower." In the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}} it was listed as a {{ill|lt=Myōjin Taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964|1=Myōjin Taisha}}, and it is also a shrine recorded in the {{ill|lt=Rikkokushi|Q1151168|WD=Q1151168|1=Rikkokushi}}. In early modern times, it received protection from the Hosokawa lords of the {{ill|lt=Tanabe Domain (Tango)|Q10863423|WD=Q10863423|lt=Tanabe Domain|1=Tango-Tanabe Domain}}. In {{ill|lt=1872|Q7753|WD=Q7753|1=1872}} (Meiji 5), it became a gōsha, and in {{ill|lt=1919|Q2157|WD=Q2157|1=1919}} (Taishō 8), it was ranked as a fusha. It is known locally as a {{ill|lt=guardian deity|Q131278957|WD=Q131278957|1=Guardian deities}} for {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=bountiful harvests|1=UNKNOWN}}, sericulture, disease prevention, and safe childbirth, and has many worshippers from {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Hokuriku|1=UNKNOWN}} and the Kansai region. === Sessha and Massha === * Kamado Shrine (Okitsuhiko-no-Kami, Okitsuhime-no-Kami) * Iso Shrine (Sukunahikona-no-Kami) * Yakuyoke Shrine (Takehayasusano-no-Mikoto) * Kōwa Shrine * Nonomiya Shrine === Cultural properties === '''City-designated cultural properties''' * Main sanctuary ({{ill|lt=1872|Q7753|WD=Q7753|1=1872}}) * Worship hall ({{ill|lt=1820|Q6973|WD=Q6973|1=1820}}) * Middle gate ({{ill|lt=1790|Q7775|WD=Q7775|1=1790}}) === Notes === {{Reflist}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:おおかわしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Ōkawa Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Ōkawa Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Myōjin Taisha]] [[Category:Shikinai Hiteisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Tango Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:京都府の神社]] [[Category:名神大社]] [[Category:丹後国の式内社|名おおかわしんしや]] [[Category:京都府の旧府社]] [[Category:舞鶴市の建築物]] [[Category:舞鶴市の歴史]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqqqqqq]]

{'text': '京都府舞鶴市大川徹光山169-1', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:大川神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11435192}} == Japanese content == {{出典の明記|date=July 2020}} {{神社 | 名称 = Ōkawa Shrine | 画像 = [[File:Okawajinzya shrine.jpg|250px]]
Torii | 所在地 = {{ill|lt=Kyoto Prefecture|Q120730|WD=Q120730|1=Kyoto Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Maizuru|Q750573|WD=Q750573|1=Maizuru}} Ōkawa Tekkōzan 169-1 | 位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} | 祭神 = {{ill|lt=Ukemochi|Q2280323|WD=Q2280323|1=Ukemochi}} | 社格 = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} (Myōjin Taisha) / former {{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q134917326|lt=Fusha|1=Fu-sha}} | 本殿 = | 例祭 = | 地図 = {{Location map|Japan Kyoto|label=Ōkawa Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=10|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Ōkawa Shrine''' (おおかわじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in Ōkawa, {{ill|lt=Maizuru|Q750573|WD=Q750573|1=Maizuru}}, {{ill|lt=Kyoto Prefecture|Q120730|WD=Q120730|1=Kyoto Prefecture}}. Its rank is {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} ({{ill|lt=Myōjin Taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964|lt=Myōjin-tai|1=Myōjin Taisha}}), and former {{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q134917326|lt=Fusha|1=Fu-sha}}. === Enshrined deities === * Main deity: {{ill|lt=Ukemochi|Q2280323|WD=Q2280323|1=Ukemochi}} * Associated deities in the same hall: Kukunochi-no-Kami (wood deity), Kagutsuchi-no-Kami (fire deity), Haniyamahime-no-Kami (earth deity), Kanayamahiko-no-Kami (metal deity), Mizuha-no-Kami (water deity) === History === According to shrine tradition: "In the Year of the Ox of Emperor Kensō ({{ill|lt=485|Q31001|WD=Q31001|1=485}}), the sacred pillars were raised and the shrine was consecrated. In the first year of {{ill|lt=Jōgan (Japan)|Q1075635|WD=Q1075635|lt=Jōgan|1=Jōgan}} ({{ill|lt=859|Q23897|WD=Q23897|1=859}}), divine rank was Junior Fifth Rank; in year 13 ({{ill|lt=861|Q23913|WD=Q23913|1=861}}), it rose to Senior Fifth Rank Lower." In the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}} it was listed as a {{ill|lt=Myōjin Taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964|1=Myōjin Taisha}}, and it is also a shrine recorded in the {{ill|lt=Rikkokushi|Q1151168|WD=Q1151168|1=Rikkokushi}}. In early modern times, it received protection from the Hosokawa lords of the {{ill|lt=Tanabe Domain (Tango)|Q10863423|WD=Q10863423|lt=Tanabe Domain|1=Tango-Tanabe Domain}}. In {{ill|lt=1872|Q7753|WD=Q7753|1=1872}} (Meiji 5), it became a gōsha, and in {{ill|lt=1919|Q2157|WD=Q2157|1=1919}} (Taishō 8), it was ranked as a fusha. It is known locally as a {{ill|lt=guardian deity|Q131278957|WD=Q131278957|1=Guardian deities}} for {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=bountiful harvests|1=UNKNOWN}}, sericulture, disease prevention, and safe childbirth, and has many worshippers from {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Hokuriku|1=UNKNOWN}} and the Kansai region. === Sessha and Massha === * Kamado Shrine (Okitsuhiko-no-Kami, Okitsuhime-no-Kami) * Iso Shrine (Sukunahikona-no-Kami) * Yakuyoke Shrine (Takehayasusano-no-Mikoto) * Kōwa Shrine * Nonomiya Shrine === Cultural properties === '''City-designated cultural properties''' * Main sanctuary ({{ill|lt=1872|Q7753|WD=Q7753|1=1872}}) * Worship hall ({{ill|lt=1820|Q6973|WD=Q6973|1=1820}}) * Middle gate ({{ill|lt=1790|Q7775|WD=Q7775|1=1790}}) === Notes === {{Reflist}} {{Shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Ōkawa Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Ōkawa Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Myōjin Taisha]] [[Category:Shikinai Hiteisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Tango Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:京都府の神社]] [[Category:名神大社]] [[Category:丹後国の式内社|名おおかわしんしや]] [[Category:京都府の旧府社]] [[Category:舞鶴市の建築物]] [[Category:舞鶴市の歴史]][[Category:qqqqqqq]]

{'text': '京都府舞鶴市大川徹光山169-1', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:大川神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11435192}} == Japanese content == {{出典の明記|date=July 2020}} {{神社 | 名称 = Ōkawa Shrine | 画像 = [[File:Okawajinzya shrine.jpg|250px]]
Torii | 所在地 = {{ill|lt=Kyoto Prefecture|Q120730|WD=Q120730|1=Kyoto Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Maizuru|Q750573|WD=Q750573|1=Maizuru}} Ōkawa Tekkōzan 169-1 | 位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} | 祭神 = {{ill|lt=Ukemochi|Q2280323|WD=Q2280323|1=Ukemochi}} | 社格 = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} (Myōjin Taisha) / former {{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q134917326|lt=Fusha|1=Fu-sha}} | 本殿 = | 例祭 = | 地図 = {{Location map|Japan Kyoto|label=Ōkawa Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=10|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Ōkawa Shrine''' (おおかわじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in Ōkawa, {{ill|lt=Maizuru|Q750573|WD=Q750573|1=Maizuru}}, {{ill|lt=Kyoto Prefecture|Q120730|WD=Q120730|1=Kyoto Prefecture}}. Its rank is {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} ({{ill|lt=Myōjin Taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964|lt=Myōjin-tai|1=Myōjin Taisha}}), and former {{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q134917326|lt=Fusha|1=Fu-sha}}. === Enshrined deities === * Main deity: {{ill|lt=Ukemochi|Q2280323|WD=Q2280323|1=Ukemochi}} * Associated deities in the same hall: Kukunochi-no-Kami (wood deity), Kagutsuchi-no-Kami (fire deity), Haniyamahime-no-Kami (earth deity), Kanayamahiko-no-Kami (metal deity), Mizuha-no-Kami (water deity) === History === According to shrine tradition: "In the Year of the Ox of Emperor Kensō ({{ill|lt=485|Q31001|WD=Q31001|1=485}}), the sacred pillars were raised and the shrine was consecrated. In the first year of {{ill|lt=Jōgan (Japan)|Q1075635|WD=Q1075635|lt=Jōgan|1=Jōgan}} ({{ill|lt=859|Q23897|WD=Q23897|1=859}}), divine rank was Junior Fifth Rank; in year 13 ({{ill|lt=861|Q23913|WD=Q23913|1=861}}), it rose to Senior Fifth Rank Lower." In the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}} it was listed as a {{ill|lt=Myōjin Taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964|1=Myōjin Taisha}}, and it is also a shrine recorded in the {{ill|lt=Rikkokushi|Q1151168|WD=Q1151168|1=Rikkokushi}}. In early modern times, it received protection from the Hosokawa lords of the {{ill|lt=Tanabe Domain (Tango)|Q10863423|WD=Q10863423|lt=Tanabe Domain|1=Tango-Tanabe Domain}}. In {{ill|lt=1872|Q7753|WD=Q7753|1=1872}} (Meiji 5), it became a gōsha, and in {{ill|lt=1919|Q2157|WD=Q2157|1=1919}} (Taishō 8), it was ranked as a fusha. It is known locally as a {{ill|lt=guardian deity|Q131278957|WD=Q131278957|1=Guardian deities}} for {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=bountiful harvests|1=UNKNOWN}}, sericulture, disease prevention, and safe childbirth, and has many worshippers from {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Hokuriku|1=UNKNOWN}} and the Kansai region. === Sessha and Massha === * Kamado Shrine (Okitsuhiko-no-Kami, Okitsuhime-no-Kami) * Iso Shrine (Sukunahikona-no-Kami) * Yakuyoke Shrine (Takehayasusano-no-Mikoto) * Kōwa Shrine * Nonomiya Shrine === Cultural properties === '''City-designated cultural properties''' * Main sanctuary ({{ill|lt=1872|Q7753|WD=Q7753|1=1872}}) * Worship hall ({{ill|lt=1820|Q6973|WD=Q6973|1=1820}}) * Middle gate ({{ill|lt=1790|Q7775|WD=Q7775|1=1790}}) === Notes === {{Reflist}} {{Shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Ōkawa Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Ōkawa Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Myōjin Taisha]] [[Category:Shikinai Hiteisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Tango Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Kyoto Prefecture]] [[Category:名神大社]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Tango Province]] [[Category:京都府の旧府社]] [[Category:舞鶴市の建築物]] [[Category:舞鶴市の歴史]][[Category:qqqqqqq]]

{'text': '京都府舞鶴市大川徹光山169-1', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:大川神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11435192}} == Japanese content == {{出典の明記|date=July 2020}} {{神社 | 名称 = Ōkawa Shrine | 画像 = [[File:Okawajinzya shrine.jpg|250px]]
Torii | 所在地 = {{ill|lt=Kyoto Prefecture|Q120730|WD=Q120730|1=Kyoto Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Maizuru|Q750573|WD=Q750573|1=Maizuru}} Ōkawa Tekkōzan 169-1 | 位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} | 祭神 = {{ill|lt=Ukemochi|Q2280323|WD=Q2280323|1=Ukemochi}} | 社格 = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} (Myōjin Taisha) / former {{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q134917326|lt=Fusha|1=Fu-sha}} | 本殿 = | 例祭 = | 地図 = {{Location map|Japan Kyoto|label=Ōkawa Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=10|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Ōkawa Shrine''' (おおかわじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in Ōkawa, {{ill|lt=Maizuru|Q750573|WD=Q750573|1=Maizuru}}, {{ill|lt=Kyoto Prefecture|Q120730|WD=Q120730|1=Kyoto Prefecture}}. Its rank is {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} ({{ill|lt=Myōjin Taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964|lt=Myōjin-tai|1=Myōjin Taisha}}), and former {{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q134917326|lt=Fusha|1=Fu-sha}}. === Enshrined deities === * Main deity: {{ill|lt=Ukemochi|Q2280323|WD=Q2280323|1=Ukemochi}} * Associated deities in the same hall: Kukunochi-no-Kami (wood deity), Kagutsuchi-no-Kami (fire deity), Haniyamahime-no-Kami (earth deity), Kanayamahiko-no-Kami (metal deity), Mizuha-no-Kami (water deity) === History === According to shrine tradition: "In the Year of the Ox of Emperor Kensō ({{ill|lt=485|Q31001|WD=Q31001|1=485}}), the sacred pillars were raised and the shrine was consecrated. In the first year of {{ill|lt=Jōgan (Japan)|Q1075635|WD=Q1075635|lt=Jōgan|1=Jōgan}} ({{ill|lt=859|Q23897|WD=Q23897|1=859}}), divine rank was Junior Fifth Rank; in year 13 ({{ill|lt=861|Q23913|WD=Q23913|1=861}}), it rose to Senior Fifth Rank Lower." In the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}} it was listed as a {{ill|lt=Myōjin Taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964|1=Myōjin Taisha}}, and it is also a shrine recorded in the {{ill|lt=Rikkokushi|Q1151168|WD=Q1151168|1=Rikkokushi}}. In early modern times, it received protection from the Hosokawa lords of the {{ill|lt=Tanabe Domain (Tango)|Q10863423|WD=Q10863423|lt=Tanabe Domain|1=Tango-Tanabe Domain}}. In {{ill|lt=1872|Q7753|WD=Q7753|1=1872}} (Meiji 5), it became a gōsha, and in {{ill|lt=1919|Q2157|WD=Q2157|1=1919}} (Taishō 8), it was ranked as a fusha. It is known locally as a {{ill|lt=guardian deity|Q131278957|WD=Q131278957|1=Guardian deities}} for {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=bountiful harvests|1=UNKNOWN}}, sericulture, disease prevention, and safe childbirth, and has many worshippers from {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Hokuriku|1=UNKNOWN}} and the Kansai region. === Sessha and Massha === * Kamado Shrine (Okitsuhiko-no-Kami, Okitsuhime-no-Kami) * Iso Shrine (Sukunahikona-no-Kami) * Yakuyoke Shrine (Takehayasusano-no-Mikoto) * Kōwa Shrine * Nonomiya Shrine === Cultural properties === '''City-designated cultural properties''' * Main sanctuary ({{ill|lt=1872|Q7753|WD=Q7753|1=1872}}) * Worship hall ({{ill|lt=1820|Q6973|WD=Q6973|1=1820}}) * Middle gate ({{ill|lt=1790|Q7775|WD=Q7775|1=1790}}) === Notes === {{Reflist}} {{Shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Ōkawa Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Ōkawa Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Myōjin Taisha]] [[Category:Shikinai Hiteisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Tango Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Kyoto Prefecture]] [[Category:Myōjin Taisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Tango Province]] [[Category:Former Fu-sha in Kyoto]] [[Category:舞鶴市の建築物]] [[Category:舞鶴市の歴史]][[Category:qqqqqqq]]

{'text': '京都府舞鶴市大川徹光山169-1', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:大川神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11435192}} == Japanese content == {{出典の明記|date=July 2020}} {{神社 | 名称 = Ōkawa Shrine | 画像 = [[File:Okawajinzya shrine.jpg|250px]]
Torii | 所在地 = {{ill|lt=Kyoto Prefecture|Q120730|WD=Q120730|1=Kyoto Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Maizuru|Q750573|WD=Q750573|1=Maizuru}} Ōkawa Tekkōzan 169-1 | 位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} | 祭神 = {{ill|lt=Ukemochi|Q2280323|WD=Q2280323|1=Ukemochi}} | 社格 = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} (Myōjin Taisha) / former {{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q134917326|lt=Fusha|1=Fu-sha}} | 本殿 = | 例祭 = | 地図 = {{Location map|Japan Kyoto|label=Ōkawa Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=10|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Ōkawa Shrine''' (おおかわじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in Ōkawa, {{ill|lt=Maizuru|Q750573|WD=Q750573|1=Maizuru}}, {{ill|lt=Kyoto Prefecture|Q120730|WD=Q120730|1=Kyoto Prefecture}}. Its rank is {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} ({{ill|lt=Myōjin Taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964|lt=Myōjin-tai|1=Myōjin Taisha}}), and former {{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q134917326|lt=Fusha|1=Fu-sha}}. === Enshrined deities === * Main deity: {{ill|lt=Ukemochi|Q2280323|WD=Q2280323|1=Ukemochi}} * Associated deities in the same hall: Kukunochi-no-Kami (wood deity), Kagutsuchi-no-Kami (fire deity), Haniyamahime-no-Kami (earth deity), Kanayamahiko-no-Kami (metal deity), Mizuha-no-Kami (water deity) === History === According to shrine tradition: "In the Year of the Ox of Emperor Kensō ({{ill|lt=485|Q31001|WD=Q31001|1=485}}), the sacred pillars were raised and the shrine was consecrated. In the first year of {{ill|lt=Jōgan (Japan)|Q1075635|WD=Q1075635|lt=Jōgan|1=Jōgan}} ({{ill|lt=859|Q23897|WD=Q23897|1=859}}), divine rank was Junior Fifth Rank; in year 13 ({{ill|lt=861|Q23913|WD=Q23913|1=861}}), it rose to Senior Fifth Rank Lower." In the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}} it was listed as a {{ill|lt=Myōjin Taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964|1=Myōjin Taisha}}, and it is also a shrine recorded in the {{ill|lt=Rikkokushi|Q1151168|WD=Q1151168|1=Rikkokushi}}. In early modern times, it received protection from the Hosokawa lords of the {{ill|lt=Tanabe Domain (Tango)|Q10863423|WD=Q10863423|lt=Tanabe Domain|1=Tango-Tanabe Domain}}. In {{ill|lt=1872|Q7753|WD=Q7753|1=1872}} (Meiji 5), it became a gōsha, and in {{ill|lt=1919|Q2157|WD=Q2157|1=1919}} (Taishō 8), it was ranked as a fusha. It is known locally as a {{ill|lt=guardian deity|Q131278957|WD=Q131278957|1=Guardian deities}} for {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=bountiful harvests|1=UNKNOWN}}, sericulture, disease prevention, and safe childbirth, and has many worshippers from {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Hokuriku|1=UNKNOWN}} and the Kansai region. === Sessha and Massha === * Kamado Shrine (Okitsuhiko-no-Kami, Okitsuhime-no-Kami) * Iso Shrine (Sukunahikona-no-Kami) * Yakuyoke Shrine (Takehayasusano-no-Mikoto) * Kōwa Shrine * Nonomiya Shrine === Cultural properties === '''City-designated cultural properties''' * Main sanctuary ({{ill|lt=1872|Q7753|WD=Q7753|1=1872}}) * Worship hall ({{ill|lt=1820|Q6973|WD=Q6973|1=1820}}) * Middle gate ({{ill|lt=1790|Q7775|WD=Q7775|1=1790}}) === Notes === {{Reflist}} {{Shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Ōkawa Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Ōkawa Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Myōjin Taisha]] [[Category:Shikinai Hiteisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Tango Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Kyoto Prefecture]] [[Category:Myōjin Taisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Tango Province]] [[Category:Former Fu-sha in Kyoto]] [[Category:Buildings in Maizuru, Kyoto]] [[Category:舞鶴市の歴史]]

{'text': '京都府舞鶴市大川徹光山169-1', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:大川神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11435192}} == Japanese content == {{出典の明記|date=July 2020}} {{神社 | 名称 = Ōkawa Shrine | 画像 = [[File:Okawajinzya shrine.jpg|250px]]
Torii | 所在地 = {{ill|lt=Kyoto Prefecture|Q120730|WD=Q120730|1=Kyoto Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Maizuru|Q750573|WD=Q750573|1=Maizuru}} Ōkawa Tekkōzan 169-1 | 位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} | 祭神 = {{ill|lt=Ukemochi|Q2280323|WD=Q2280323|1=Ukemochi}} | 社格 = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} (Myōjin Taisha) / former {{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q134917326|lt=Fusha|1=Fu-sha}} | 本殿 = | 例祭 = | 地図 = {{Location map|Japan Kyoto|label=Ōkawa Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=10|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Ōkawa Shrine''' (おおかわじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in Ōkawa, {{ill|lt=Maizuru|Q750573|WD=Q750573|1=Maizuru}}, {{ill|lt=Kyoto Prefecture|Q120730|WD=Q120730|1=Kyoto Prefecture}}. Its rank is {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} ({{ill|lt=Myōjin Taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964|lt=Myōjin-tai|1=Myōjin Taisha}}), and former {{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q134917326|lt=Fusha|1=Fu-sha}}. === Enshrined deities === * Main deity: {{ill|lt=Ukemochi|Q2280323|WD=Q2280323|1=Ukemochi}} * Associated deities in the same hall: Kukunochi-no-Kami (wood deity), Kagutsuchi-no-Kami (fire deity), Haniyamahime-no-Kami (earth deity), Kanayamahiko-no-Kami (metal deity), Mizuha-no-Kami (water deity) === History === According to shrine tradition: "In the Year of the Ox of Emperor Kensō ({{ill|lt=485|Q31001|WD=Q31001|1=485}}), the sacred pillars were raised and the shrine was consecrated. In the first year of {{ill|lt=Jōgan (Japan)|Q1075635|WD=Q1075635|lt=Jōgan|1=Jōgan}} ({{ill|lt=859|Q23897|WD=Q23897|1=859}}), divine rank was Junior Fifth Rank; in year 13 ({{ill|lt=861|Q23913|WD=Q23913|1=861}}), it rose to Senior Fifth Rank Lower." In the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}} it was listed as a {{ill|lt=Myōjin Taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964|1=Myōjin Taisha}}, and it is also a shrine recorded in the {{ill|lt=Rikkokushi|Q1151168|WD=Q1151168|1=Rikkokushi}}. In early modern times, it received protection from the Hosokawa lords of the {{ill|lt=Tanabe Domain (Tango)|Q10863423|WD=Q10863423|lt=Tanabe Domain|1=Tango-Tanabe Domain}}. In {{ill|lt=1872|Q7753|WD=Q7753|1=1872}} (Meiji 5), it became a gōsha, and in {{ill|lt=1919|Q2157|WD=Q2157|1=1919}} (Taishō 8), it was ranked as a fusha. It is known locally as a {{ill|lt=guardian deity|Q131278957|WD=Q131278957|1=Guardian deities}} for {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=bountiful harvests|1=UNKNOWN}}, sericulture, disease prevention, and safe childbirth, and has many worshippers from {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Hokuriku|1=UNKNOWN}} and the Kansai region. === Sessha and Massha === * Kamado Shrine (Okitsuhiko-no-Kami, Okitsuhime-no-Kami) * Iso Shrine (Sukunahikona-no-Kami) * Yakuyoke Shrine (Takehayasusano-no-Mikoto) * Kōwa Shrine * Nonomiya Shrine === Cultural properties === '''City-designated cultural properties''' * Main sanctuary ({{ill|lt=1872|Q7753|WD=Q7753|1=1872}}) * Worship hall ({{ill|lt=1820|Q6973|WD=Q6973|1=1820}}) * Middle gate ({{ill|lt=1790|Q7775|WD=Q7775|1=1790}}) === Notes === {{Reflist}} {{Shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Ōkawa Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Ōkawa Shrine]][[Category:Myōjin Taisha]] [[Category:Shikinai Hiteisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Tango Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Kyoto Prefecture]] [[Category:Myōjin Taisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Tango Province]] [[Category:Former Fu-sha in Kyoto]] [[Category:Buildings and structures in Maizuru, Kyoto]] [[Category:舞鶴市の歴史]]
